papers.title_en: Medical Multimodal Large Language Models: A Survey
papers.tldr: 本综述系统探讨了医疗多模态大语言模型（Medical MLLMs）的发展，分析了如何通过整合临床报告、医学影像和生理数据等多种模态来提升医疗AI的理解与生成能力。文章梳理了该领域的核心技术架构、主流数据集及评估标准，并探讨了其在临床决策支持中的应用潜力与挑战，为该领域的未来研究提供了全面的参考指南。
papers.abstract_en: In recent years, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have gradually givenrise to medical multimodal large language models (Medical MLLMs) through theintegration of multimodal data such as clinical reports, medical images, physiological …

papers.title_en: PeFoMed: Parameter efficient fine-tuning of multimodal large language models for medical CXR
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗胸部X光（CXR）影像分析，提出了PeFoMed框架，旨在通过参数高效微调（PEFT）技术提升多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在特定医疗领域的表现。该方法在显著降低计算资源消耗和参数更新量的同时，实现了对医学影像的精准理解与高质量报告生成，为医疗AI模型的轻量化部署与专业化适配提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) represent an evolutionary expansion inthe capabilities of traditional large language models, enabling them to tacklechallenges that surpass the scope of purely text-based applications. Recent works …

papers.title_en: Clinical Knowledge-Guided PET/CT Lesion Segmentation with Interpretable Fusion of Metabolic and Structural Cues
papers.tldr: 本研究针对18F-FDG PET/CT全身病灶自动分割的挑战，提出了一种结合临床知识引导的深度学习框架。该方法通过可解释的融合机制，有效整合了PET提供的代谢信息与CT提供的结构信息，旨在解决手动分割效率低且易出错的问题。主要贡献在于引入了临床先验知识来增强多模态特征融合，显著提升了肿瘤负荷评估的准确性与效率。
papers.abstract_en: Automated whole-body lesion segmentation in 18 F-FDG PET/CT images marks apivotal breakthrough in oncological diagnostics, substantially improving the accuracyand efficiency of tumor burden assessment. Manual segmentation is often plagued …

papers.title_en: HUCSR-Net: Automated Pulmonary Embolism Detection Using 3D Deep Learning
papers.tldr: 肺栓塞（PE）是心血管死亡的主要原因，临床诊断具有挑战性。本研究提出了一种名为HUCSR-Net的3D深度学习网络，旨在通过CTPA影像实现肺栓塞的自动化检测。该模型利用3D卷积神经网络提取空间特征，显著提升了检测效率与准确性，为急诊环境下的快速诊断提供了有效的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background Pulmonary embolism (PE) remains a leading cause of cardiovascularmortality and a major diagnostic challenge in emergency settings worldwide.Although computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA) is the reference …

papers.title_en: Prediction of p53 Expression in Intrahepatic Mass-forming Cholangiocarcinoma Using a Union Model Based on Intra-and Peritumoral MRI Radiomics
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发一种非侵入性预测肝内肿块型胆管癌（IMCC）中p53表达的模型。通过整合临床特征以及基于T2WI和DWI序列的瘤内与瘤周影像组学特征，构建了一个联合模型。研究结果表明，该模型在预测p53表达方面具有较高的准确性，为IMCC的术前评估和个体化治疗提供了重要的影像学参考。
papers.abstract_en: Objective To develop and validate a Union Model integrating clinical features withradiomics signatures derived from intratumoral and peritumoral T2-weighted imaging(T2WI) and diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI) for the non-invasive prediction of p53 …

papers.title_en: Thought Graph Traversal for Test-time Scaling in Chest X-ray VLLMs
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X射线视觉语言大模型（VLLM）的推理性能提升，提出了一种名为“思维图遍历”的测试时缩放方法。该方法无需额外训练，通过在推理阶段构建和遍历思维图来优化模型的逻辑推理能力，为医疗影像分析提供了一种高效且可扩展的性能增强方案，显著提升了模型在复杂诊断任务中的表现。
papers.abstract_en: Test-time scaling offers a promising way to improve the reasoning performance ofvision-language large models (VLLMs) without additional training. In this paper, weexplore a simple but effective approach for applying test-time scaling to chest X-ray …

papers.title_en: Ensembled composite spatial, radiomics, and dosimetric features for early onset prediction of complications in head and neck radiotherapy treatments
papers.tldr: 本研究针对头颈部癌症放疗中常见的放射性坏死和进食障碍等并发症，提出了一种基于集成学习的早期预测框架。该方法通过融合空间位置、影像组学及剂量学等多维度复合特征，构建了高效的预测模型。研究结果表明，这种多特征集成策略能显著提升并发症的预测精度，为临床医生在治疗早期识别高风险患者并实施个性化干预提供了重要的决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: While intensity-modulated radiotherapy (IMRT) can reduce the exposure to healthytissues, patients still frequently experience adverse effects, and some toxicities suchas radionecrosis (RD) and feeding impairment requiring nasogastric (NG) tube …

papers.title_en: Radiomic feature-based classification of BI-RADS 4/5 breast lesions on contrast-enhanced mammography
papers.tldr: 本研究针对BI-RADS 4/5类乳腺病变（尤其是结构扭曲）良恶性鉴别困难的临床痛点，探索了对比增强乳腺摄影（CEM）影像组学特征的分类价值。通过分析CEM低能量图像的组学特征，研究旨在提高诊断准确性。该方法为高风险乳腺病变的精准评估提供了新工具，有助于优化临床决策并减少不必要的活检。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Background and Objective: Differentiating benign from malignant BI-RADS4/5 lesions, particularly architectural distortions, remains challenging. Weinvestigated whether radiomics from contrast-enhanced mammography (low-energy …

papers.title_en: Enhancing chest X-ray report generation with pathology-guided prompts and vision-language shortcut bias mitigation
papers.tldr: Chest X-rays are among the most used diagnostic methods worldwide. However,interpreting these images remains a complex and time-consuming task. This workaddresses the challenge of automated chest X-ray report generation by leveraging …。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-rays are among the most used diagnostic methods worldwide. However,interpreting these images remains a complex and time-consuming task. This workaddresses the challenge of automated chest X-ray report generation by leveraging …

papers.title_en: An Interpretable Radiomics Model Based on Multi‐DLCT Images for Differentiating Benign and Malignant Solid Solitary Pulmonary Nodules
papers.tldr: 本研究针对侵袭性强、预后差的实性孤立性肺结节（SPN），提出了一种基于多参数双层光谱探测器CT（DLCT）图像的可解释影像组学模型。通过挖掘DLCT多能谱数据中的深层特征，该模型实现了对良恶性结节的高效鉴别。研究不仅提升了诊断的准确性，还通过可解释性分析增强了临床信任度，为早期肺癌的精准诊疗提供了重要的无创辅助决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background Early‐stage lung cancer frequently presents as a solitary pulmonarynodule. Compared with subsolid pulmonary nodules, solid pulmonary nodules areassociated with greater invasiveness, earlier metastasis, faster growth, and worse …

papers.title_en: See Fair, Speak Truth: Equitable Attention Improves Grounding and Reduces Hallucination in Vision-Language Alignment
papers.tldr: 多模态大语言模型常因注意力过度集中于视觉显著或高频内容而产生幻觉。本文提出“公平注意力”机制，通过在解码过程中优化注意力分配，使模型能够更均衡地感知视觉输入。该方法有效增强了视觉接地能力，显著减少了幻觉现象，在多个基准测试中提升了视觉与语言的对齐质量，为构建更可靠的多模态系统提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that areabsent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding isdisproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We …

papers.title_en: Bringing Value Models Back: Generative Critics for Value Modeling in LLM Reinforcement Learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型强化学习（RL）中的信用分配难题，提出重新引入经典的价值模型。通过开发“生成式评论家”（Generative Critics），该方法能够实现比传统奖励模型更细粒度的优势估计，从而有效解决复杂任务中的反馈延迟与模糊问题。实验表明，该方法显著提升了LLM在强化学习过程中的训练效率和最终性能，为优化模型对齐提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Credit assignment is a central challenge in reinforcement learning (RL). Classicalactor-critic methods address this challenge through fine-grained advantageestimation based on a learned value function. However, learned value models are …

papers.title_en: Eliciting Medical Reasoning with Knowledge-enhanced Data Synthesis: A Semi-Supervised Reinforcement Learning Approach
papers.tldr: 针对医学领域高质量推理数据稀缺的问题，本文提出一种知识增强的数据合成方法。该方法采用半监督强化学习框架，利用外部医学知识引导大语言模型生成高质量的思维链推理路径。研究贡献在于通过自动化合成数据显著提升了模型在复杂医疗任务中的逻辑推理能力，为医疗大模型的优化提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: While large language models hold promise for complex medical applications, theirdevelopment is hindered by the scarcity of high-quality reasoning data. To addressthis issue, existing approaches typically distill chain-of-thought reasoning traces from …

papers.title_en: A Mechanistic Analysis of Looped Reasoning Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究对循环推理语言模型（Looped Reasoning LLMs）进行了深入的机械论分析。这类模型通过在潜空间中循环调用层结构来增强推理能力，文章探讨了其内部运作机制。研究揭示了循环架构如何通过迭代处理复杂逻辑，为理解和优化大语言模型的推理性能提供了重要的理论基础和实验证据。
papers.abstract_en: Reasoning has become a central capability in large language models. Recentresearch has shown that reasoning performance can be improved by looping anLLM's layers in the latent dimension, resulting in looped reasoning language models …

papers.title_en: WebCompass: Towards Multimodal Web Coding Evaluation for Code Language Models
papers.tldr: 随着大语言模型向端到端交互式Web编程智能体演进，现有基准测试仅局限于文本生成和静态指标，无法全面评估其能力。本文提出WebCompass，一个全新的多模态Web编程评估基准。它通过模拟真实开发场景，结合视觉和文本输入，对代码语言模型在复杂Web任务中的表现进行多维度评估，填补了该领域的空白。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models are rapidly evolving into interactive coding agents capableof end-to-end web coding, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only narrow slices ofthis capability, typically text-conditioned generation with static-correctness metrics …

papers.title_en: Pause or Fabricate? Training Language Models for Grounded Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在输入信息不完整时容易产生“幻觉”并编造虚假结论的问题，提出了针对性的训练方法。通过引导模型在推理过程中识别信息缺失并选择“暂停”而非盲目推断，增强了模型的可靠性。该方法有效提升了模型在复杂推理任务中的接地性，减少了不可靠输出，为构建更诚实、可信的AI系统提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models have achieved remarkable progress on complex reasoningtasks. However, they often implicitly fabricate information when inputs areincomplete, producing confident but unreliable conclusions--a failure mode we term …

papers.title_en: VLA Foundry: A Unified Framework for Training Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.tldr: We present VLA Foundry, an open-source framework that unifies LLM, VLM, andVLA training in a single codebase. Most open-source VLA efforts specialize on theaction training stage, often stitching together incompatible pretraining pipelines. VLA …。
papers.abstract_en: We present VLA Foundry, an open-source framework that unifies LLM, VLM, andVLA training in a single codebase. Most open-source VLA efforts specialize on theaction training stage, often stitching together incompatible pretraining pipelines. VLA …

papers.title_en: Thinking Like a Botanist: Challenging Multimodal Language Models with Intent-Driven Chain-of-Inquiry
papers.tldr: Vision evaluations are typically done through multi-step processes. In mostcontemporary fields, experts analyze images using structured, evidence-basedadaptive questioning. In plant pathology, botanists inspect leaf images, identify visual …。
papers.abstract_en: Vision evaluations are typically done through multi-step processes. In mostcontemporary fields, experts analyze images using structured, evidence-basedadaptive questioning. In plant pathology, botanists inspect leaf images, identify visual …
